title: Mantello Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids- Set of 3 Jars for Candy Buffet - Apothecary Jars for Bathroom, Candy Bar, Kitchen, Large
description:
About this item
These beautiful apothecary jars are crafted from strong, durable glass, designed to hold up for many occasions and daily use.
Elevate your living space with these exquisite apothecary jars with lids. Each set comes with 3 jars in different sizes (14.75" H x 5" W, 12.75" H x 5" W, 10" H x 4.5" W)
There are so many uses for these jars! Use them as candy jars for candy buffet, glass vases, decorative jars, apothecary jars bathroom, and more.
These large glass apothecary jars with lids are designed to add a touch of vintage elegance to your home or event. Beautifully shaped and eye-catching, they easily enhance any décor.
Designed to make your home a more pleasant place, we're confident you'll delight in our large apothecary jars. If you have any questions or issues, simply contact us and we will make it right
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
Play Video
We used these as candy holders for a dessert table at my daughter's first birthday! They held TONS of M&M's and TONS of Sweetheart Candies! It was adorable! They came well packaged and I didn't have any broken pieces.I get compliments when family and friends come over. I have this set filled with different candies. My granddaughter loves to sample the candies and so do I.These glass jars are priced very reasonably considering their size and unique shapes. I wish the lids had a rubber gasket or something similar, so they would fit a bit more securely to the jars. Not a huge issue but use caution when moving jars with lids in place. I use mine for my three favorite snack items. Really decorative yet functional as well!Everyone compliments the vases ! They are a beautiful asset to your homeSo very happy with this product. You get a lot of value for the money. The apothecary jars are a good size and they are beautiful!! The thickness of these jars are perfect and they came well packaged. Right now, I am using them as a table centerpiece for St Patrick's Day. I will get a lot of use out of these jars for different occasions throughout the year!These were exactly what I was wanting. Great quality and perfect size for a centerpiece.These candy jars are a beautiful way to dress up your favorite candies,Nuts ect. for a inviting way to treat your guests and of course yourself ❣️🍫🍬🧆They were the perfect sizeExactly what I needed for graduation candy tableGood for party
reviews_1s: Ordered these expecting them to be delivered in good shape they were wrapped securely, and the largest jar has a chip in the bottom of the pedestal very disappointed in too much of a hassle to returnOnly 2 of the 3 jar set were in the box which leads me to think this was repackaged . I was really looking forward to getting these. Ghetto ghetto ghetto….They just look very bad the lids are not straight they do not fit the jars. Very bad. Product cap diappointedArrived shattered. The glass is horribly thin and not functional. Thin as a light bulbItem was broken had to throw it awayThe shape and size were nice but the jars themselves had tons of imperfections that almost looked like cracks. Returned.The middle Jar arrived broken.Super cheap. One of the lids doesn't fit the jar correctly.Way to small
